495→    private fun rearrangeArrow(
496→        node: ASTNode,
497→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
498→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
499→    ) {
500→        val p = node.treeParent
501→        if (
502→            // check
503→            // `{ p -> ... }`
504→            // and
505→            // `when { m -> ... }`
506→            // only
507→            p.elementType.let { it != FUNCTION_LITERAL && it != WHEN_ENTRY } ||
508→            // ... and only if expression after -> spans multiple lines
509→            !p.textContains('\n') ||
510→            // permit
511→            // when {
512→            //     m -> 0 + d({
513→            //     })
514→            // }
515→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && mustBeFollowedByNewline(node)) ||
516→            // permit
517→            // when (this) {
518→            //     in 0x1F600..0x1F64F, // Emoticons
519→            //     0x200D // Zero-width Joiner
520→            //     -> true
521→            // }
522→            (p.elementType == WHEN_ENTRY && node.prevLeaf()?.textContains('\n') == true)
523→        ) {
524→            return
525→        }
526→        if (!node.nextCodeLeaf()?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
527→            requireNewlineAfterLeaf(node, autoCorrect, emit)
528→        }
529→        val r = node.nextSibling { it.elementType == RBRACE } ?: return
530→        if (!r.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
531→            requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(r, autoCorrect, emit, node.indent())
532→        }
533→    }

535→    private fun requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
536→        node: ASTNode,
537→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
538→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
539→        indent: String,
540→    ) {
541→        emit(
542→            node.startOffset - 1,
543→            """Missing newline before "${node.text}"""",
544→            true,
545→        )
546→        LOGGER.trace { "$line: " + ((if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline before ${node.text}") }
547→        if (autoCorrect) {
548→            node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(indent)

552→    private fun requireNewlineAfterLeaf(
553→        nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired: ASTNode,
554→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
555→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
556→        indent: String? = null,
557→        nodeToFix: ASTNode = nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired,
558→    ) {
559→        emit(
560→            nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.startOffset + 1,
561→            """Missing newline after "${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"""",
562→            true,
563→        )
564→        LOGGER.trace {
565→            "$line: " + (if (!autoCorrect) "would have " else "") + "inserted newline after ${nodeAfterWhichNewlineIsRequired.text}"
566→        }
567→        if (autoCorrect) {
568→            val tempIndent = indent ?: (nodeToFix.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent))
569→            nodeToFix.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(tempIndent)
570→        }
571→    }

573→    private fun KtStringTemplateExpression.isMultiLine(): Boolean {

576→                val v = child.text

585→    private fun ASTNode.hasLineBreak(vararg ignoreElementTypes: IElementType): Boolean {
586→        if (isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) return true
587→        return if (ignoreElementTypes.isEmpty()) {
588→            textContains('\n')
589→        } else {
590→            elementType !in ignoreElementTypes &&
591→                children().any { c -> c.textContains('\n') && c.elementType !in ignoreElementTypes }

603→    /**
604→     *  Allow for-statement in which only the expression contains a newline:
605→     *     for (foo in listOf(
606→     *         "foo-1",
607→     *         "foo-2"
608→     *     )) { ... }
609→     * but reject:
610→     *     for (
611→     *         foo in listOf(
612→     *             "foo-1",
613→     *             "foo-2"
614→     *         )
615→     *     ) { ... }
616→     */
617→    private fun ASTNode.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression(): Boolean {
618→        if (treeParent.elementType != ElementType.FOR) {
619→            return false
620→        }
621→        if (this.elementType != LPAR) {
622→            return treeParent.findChildByType(LPAR)!!.isPartOfForLoopConditionWithMultilineExpression()
623→        }
624→        require(elementType == LPAR) {
625→            "Node should be the LPAR of the FOR loop"
626→        }
627→
628→        var node: ASTNode? = this
629→        while (node != null && node.elementType != RPAR) {
630→            if (node.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()) {
631→                return false
632→            }
633→            node = node.nextSibling()
634→        }
635→        return true
636→    }

638→    override fun afterVisitChildNodes(
639→        node: ASTNode,
640→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
641→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
642→    ) {
643→        if (node.elementType == BLOCK) {
644→            val startOfBlock = node.prevLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
645→            if (startOfBlock?.elementType != LBRACE) {
646→                return
647→            }
648→            val blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline = startOfBlock.nextLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
649→            val endOfBlock = node.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextLeaf { !it.isPartOfComment() && !it.isWhiteSpace() }
650→            val blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline = endOfBlock?.prevLeaf().isWhiteSpaceWithNewline()
651→            val wrapBlock =
652→                !blockIsFollowedByWhitespaceContainingNewline && (
653→                    blockIsPrecededByWhitespaceContainingNewline || node.textContains('\n')
654→                    )
655→            if (wrapBlock && endOfBlock != null) {
656→                requireNewlineBeforeLeaf(
657→                    endOfBlock,
658→                    autoCorrect,
659→                    emit,
660→                    node.treeParent.indent(),
661→                )
662→            }
663→        }
664→    }

666→    private companion object {
667→        private val LTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(LPAR, LBRACE, LBRACKET, LT)
668→        private val RTOKEN_SET = TokenSet.create(RPAR, RBRACE, RBRACKET, GT)
669→        private val MATCHING_RTOKEN_MAP =
670→            LTOKEN_SET.types.zip(
671→                RTOKEN_SET.types,
672→            ).toMap()
673→    }
674→}

 49→/**
 50→ * Ensures that annotation are wrapped to separate lines.
 51→ *
 52→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#annotation-formatting
 53→ *
 54→ * 1) Place annotations on separate lines before the declaration to which they are attached, and with the same indentation:
 55→ *
 56→ *    ```
 57→ *    @Target(AnnotationTarget.PROPERTY)
 58→ *    annotation class JsonExclude
 59→ *    ```
 60→ *
 61→ * 2) Annotations without arguments may be placed on the same line:
 62→ *
 63→ *    ```
 64→ *    @JsonExclude @JvmField
 65→ *    var x: String
 66→ *    ```
 67→ *
 68→ * 3) A single annotation without arguments may be placed on the same line as the corresponding declaration:
 69→ *
 70→ *    ```
 71→ *    @Test fun foo() { /*...*/ }
 72→ *    ```
 73→ *
 74→ * 4) File annotations are placed after the file comment (if any), before the package statement, and are separated from package with a blank
 75→ *    line (to emphasize the fact that they target the file and not the package).
 76→ *
 77→ * @see [AnnotationSpacingRule] for white space rules.
 78→ */
 79→public class AnnotationRule :
 80→    StandardRule(
 81→        id = "annotation",
 82→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 83→            setOf(
 84→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 85→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 86→            ),
 87→        visitorModifiers =
 88→            setOf(
 89→                RunAfterRule(
 90→                    ruleId = ENUM_WRAPPING_RULE_ID,
 91→                    mode = REGARDLESS_WHETHER_RUN_AFTER_RULE_IS_LOADED_OR_DISABLED,
 92→                ),
 93→            ),
 94→    ) {
 95→    private var codeStyle = CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY.defaultValue
 96→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 97→
 98→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 99→        codeStyle = editorConfig[CODE_STYLE_PROPERTY]
100→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
101→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
102→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
103→        )
104→    }
105→
106→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
107→        node: ASTNode,
108→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
109→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
110→    ) {
111→        when (node.elementType) {
112→            FILE_ANNOTATION_LIST -> {
113→                visitFileAnnotationList(node, emit, autoCorrect)
114→            }
115→            ANNOTATION -> {
116→                // Annotation array
117→                //     @[...]
118→                visitAnnotation(node, emit, autoCorrect)
119→            }
120→            ANNOTATION_ENTRY -> {
121→                visitAnnotationEntry(node, emit, autoCorrect)
122→            }
123→        }
124→    }
125→
126→    private fun visitAnnotationEntry(
127→        node: ASTNode,
128→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
129→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
130→    ) {
131→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
132→
133→        if (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() &&
134→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
135→            node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
136→            node.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation()
137→        ) {
138→            // Disallow:
139→            //     @Foo class Bar
140→            // Allow function parameters and arguments to have annotation on same line as identifier:
141→            //     fun @receiver:Bar String.foo() {}
142→            //     fun foo(
143→            //         @Bar("bar") bar,
144→            //         @Bar("bar") "42",
145→            //     ) {}
146→            checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(node, emit, autoCorrect)
147→        }
148→
149→        if (codeStyle == ktlint_official &&
150→            node.isPrimaryConstructor()
151→        ) {
152→            if (node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()) {
153→                if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct() &&
154→                    (node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() || node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine())
155→                ) {
156→                    node
157→                        .treeParent
158→                        .treeParent
159→                        .prevLeaf()
160→                        ?.takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() && !it.textContains('\n') }
161→                        ?.let {
162→                            emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation must be placed on a separate line", true)
163→                            if (autoCorrect) {
164→                                it.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
165→                            }
166→                        }
167→                }
168→            } else {
169→                if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine()) {
170→                    emit(node.startOffset, "Annotation must be placed on a separate line", true)
171→                    if (autoCorrect) {
172→                        node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
173→                    }
174→                }
175→            }
176→        }
177→
178→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()) {
179→            if (node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
180→                // Code below is disallowed
181→                //   @Foo1
182→                //   @Foo2 fun foo() {}
183→                emit(
184→                    node.startOffset,
185→                    "Annotation must be placed on a separate line when it is preceded by another annotation on a separate line",
186→                    true,
187→                )
188→                if (autoCorrect) {
189→                    node
190→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
191→                        .nextLeaf()
192→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
193→                }
194→            }
195→
196→            if (node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATION &&
197→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_PARAMETER &&
198→                node.treeParent.treeParent.elementType != VALUE_ARGUMENT &&
199→                node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
200→                node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
201→            ) {
202→                // Code below is disallowed
203→                //   @Foo1 @Foo2 fun foo() {}
204→                // But following is allowed:
205→                //   @[Foo1 Foo2] fun foo() {}
206→                //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
207→                emit(
208→                    node.findAnnotatedConstruct().startOffset,
209→                    "Multiple annotations should not be placed on the same line as the annotated construct",
210→                    true,
211→                )
212→                if (autoCorrect) {
213→                    node
214→                        .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
215→                        .nextCodeLeaf()
216→                        ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
217→                }
218→            }
219→
220→            node.typeProjectionOrNull()
221→                ?.prevCodeLeaf()
222→                ?.let { startOfList ->
223→                    // Code below is disallowed
224→                    //   var foo: List<@Foo1 @Foo2 String>
225→                    // But following is allowed:
226→                    //   var foo: List<@[Foo1 Foo2] String>
227→                    //   fun foo(@Bar1 @Bar2 bar) {}
228→                    if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() || node.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList()) &&
229→                        node.isFirstAnnotationEntry()
230→                    ) {
231→                        emit(startOfList.startOffset, "Expected newline after '${startOfList.text}'", true)
232→                        if (autoCorrect) {
233→                            startOfList
234→                                .upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
235→                        }
236→                    }
237→                    if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() &&
238→                        node.isLastAnnotationEntry()
239→                    ) {
240→                        node
241→                            .findAnnotatedConstruct()
242→                            .treeParent
243→                            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
244→                            .nextLeaf { it.isCodeLeaf() && it.elementType != ElementType.COMMA }
245→                            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
246→                                emit(codeLeaf.startOffset, "Expected newline before '${codeLeaf.text}'", true)
247→                                if (autoCorrect) {
248→                                    codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
249→                                }
250→                            }
251→                    }
252→                }
253→        }
254→
255→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() && node.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine()) {
256→            // Code below is disallowed
257→            //   @Foo1
258→            //   @Foo2 @Foo3
259→            //   fun foo() {}
260→            emit(
261→                node.startOffset,
262→                "All annotations should either be on a single line or all annotations should be on a separate line",
263→                true,
264→            )
265→            if (autoCorrect) {
266→                node
267→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
268→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
269→            }
270→        }
271→    }
272→
273→    private fun ASTNode.typeProjectionOrNull() =
274→        takeIf { elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
275→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST }
276→            ?.treeParent
277→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_REFERENCE }
278→            ?.treeParent
279→            ?.takeIf { it.treeParent.elementType == TYPE_PROJECTION }
280→            ?.treeParent
281→
282→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByAnnotationOnAnotherLine(): Boolean {
283→        val firstAnnotation = treeParent.findChildByType(ANNOTATION_ENTRY)
284→        return siblings(forward = false)
285→            .takeWhile { it != firstAnnotation }
286→            .any { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
287→    }
288→
289→    private fun checkForAnnotationWithParameterToBePlacedOnSeparateLine(
290→        node: ASTNode,
291→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
292→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
293→    ) {
294→        if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry()) {
295→            emit(
296→                node.startOffset,
297→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
298→                true,
299→            )
300→            if (autoCorrect) {
301→                node
302→                    .firstChildLeafOrSelf()
303→                    .upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
304→            }
305→        }
306→
307→        if (node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct()) {
308→            emit(
309→                node.startOffset,
310→                "Annotation with parameter(s) should be placed on a separate line prior to the annotated construct",
311→                // Annotated expressions for which the annotation contains a parameter can be hard to correct
312→                // automatically. See examples below. For now, let them be fixed manually.
313→                // fun foo1() = @Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()
314→                // if (@Suppress("DEPRECATION") bar()) { .. }
315→                node.treeParent.elementType != ANNOTATED_EXPRESSION,
316→            )
317→            if (autoCorrect) {
318→                node
319→                    .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
320→                    .nextLeaf()
321→                    .safeAs<LeafPsiElement>()
322→                    ?.let {
323→                        if (it.elementType == WHITE_SPACE) {
324→                            it.replaceWithText(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
325→                        } else {
326→                            it.rawInsertBeforeMe(
327→                                PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent)),
328→                            )
329→                        }
330→                    }
331→            }
332→        }
333→    }
334→
335→    private fun ASTNode.isNotReceiverTargetAnnotation() = getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() != AnnotationUseSiteTarget.RECEIVER
336→
337→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget() =
338→        psi
339→            .safeAs<KtAnnotationEntry>()
340→            ?.useSiteTarget
341→            ?.getAnnotationUseSiteTarget()
342→
343→    private fun ASTNode.isAnnotationEntryWithValueArgumentList() = getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() != null
344→
345→    private fun ASTNode.getAnnotationEntryValueArgumentList() =
346→        takeIf { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
347→            ?.findChildByType(VALUE_ARGUMENT_LIST)
348→
349→    private fun ASTNode.isFirstAnnotationEntry() =
350→        this ==
351→            treeParent
352→                .children()
353→                .firstOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
354→
355→    private fun ASTNode.isLastAnnotationEntry() =
356→        this ==
357→            treeParent
358→                .children()
359→                .lastOrNull { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
360→
361→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
362→        siblings(forward = false)
363→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
364→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
365→
366→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntryOnTheSameLine() =
367→        siblings()
368→            .takeWhile { !it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
369→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
370→
371→    private fun ASTNode.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() =
372→        siblings(forward = false)
373→            .any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
374→
375→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry() =
376→        siblings(forward = false)
377→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
378→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
379→
380→    private fun ASTNode.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() = siblings(forward = true).any { it.elementType == ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
381→
382→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry() =
383→        siblings(forward = true)
384→            .takeWhile { it.elementType != ANNOTATION_ENTRY }
385→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
386→
387→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct(): Boolean {
388→        val annotatedConstruct = findAnnotatedConstruct()
389→        return lastChildLeafOrSelf()
390→            .leaves(forward = true)
391→            .takeWhile { it != annotatedConstruct }
392→            .none { it.isWhiteSpaceWithNewline() }
393→    }
394→
395→    private fun ASTNode.findAnnotatedConstruct(): ASTNode {
396→        val astNode =
397→            if (treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST) {
398→                treeParent
399→            } else {
400→                this
401→            }
402→        return checkNotNull(
403→            astNode.lastChildLeafOrSelf().nextCodeLeaf(),
404→        )
405→    }
406→
407→    private fun ASTNode.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntryOrAnnotatedConstruct() =
408→        if (isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
409→            isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()
410→        } else {
411→            isOnSameLineAsAnnotatedConstruct()
412→        }
413→
414→    private fun visitFileAnnotationList(
415→        node: ASTNode,
416→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
417→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
418→    ) {
419→        node
420→            .lastChildLeafOrSelf()
421→            .nextCodeLeaf()
422→            ?.let { codeLeaf ->
423→                val whitespaceBefore = codeLeaf.prevLeaf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
424→
425→                if (whitespaceBefore == null || whitespaceBefore.text != "\n\n") {
426→                    emit(
427→                        codeLeaf.startOffset,
428→                        "File annotations should be separated from file contents with a blank line",
429→                        true,
430→                    )
431→                    if (autoCorrect) {
432→                        codeLeaf.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe("\n\n")
433→                    }
434→                }
435→            }
436→    }
437→
438→    private fun visitAnnotation(
439→        node: ASTNode,
440→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
441→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
442→    ) {
443→        require(node.elementType == ANNOTATION)
444→
445→        if ((node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsNextAnnotationEntry()) ||
446→            (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry() && node.isOnSameLineAsPreviousAnnotationEntry())
447→        ) {
448→            emit(
449→                node.startOffset,
450→                "@[...] style annotations should be on a separate line from other annotations.",
451→                true,
452→            )
453→            if (autoCorrect) {
454→                if (node.isFollowedByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
455→                    node.upsertWhitespaceAfterMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
456→                } else if (node.isPrecededByOtherAnnotationEntry()) {
457→                    node.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(node.getNewlineWithIndent(node.treeParent))
458→                }
459→            }
460→        }
461→    }
462→
463→    private fun ASTNode.isPrimaryConstructor() =
464→        treeParent.elementType == MODIFIER_LIST && treeParent.treeParent.elementType == PRIMARY_CONSTRUCTOR
465→
466→    private fun ASTNode.getNewlineWithIndent(modifierListRoot: ASTNode): String {
467→        val typeProjection = typeProjectionOrNull()
468→        val nodeToIndentFrom =
469→            if (isPrimaryConstructor()) {
470→                modifierListRoot.treeParent.treeParent
471→            } else {
472→                modifierListRoot.treeParent
473→            }
474→        val indentWithoutNewline =
475→            nodeToIndentFrom
476→                .treePrev
477→                ?.text
478→                .orEmpty()
479→                .let {
480→                    if (it.contains('\n')) {
481→                        it.substringAfterLast('\n')
482→                    } else {
483→                        ""
484→                    }
485→                }
486→        return "\n"
487→            .plus(indentWithoutNewline)
488→            .applyIf(typeProjection != null || isPrimaryConstructor()) {
489→                plus(indentConfig.indent)
490→            }
491→    }
492→}

494→public val ANNOTATION_RULE_ID: RuleId = AnnotationRule().ruleId
